description: 1000 cookie key=value pairs — tests parser performance limits
Two separate Cookie headers — should be folded per RFC 6265 §5.4
rawRequest:
GET /echo HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Cookie: a=1
Cookie: b=2
rawResponse:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
x-powered-by: Dart with package:shelf
date: <DATE>
content-length: 40
x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN
content-type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block
x-content-type-options: nosniff

cookie: a=1,b=2
host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
